phrases.example: To summarize the current status, we’re on track for the core features.
The main risk is integration delays with the vendor.
To mitigate this, we can ship a fallback option.
Our assumption is that the API remains stable.
If that changes, we will adjust the scope.
The trade-off is speed versus coverage.

phrases.text: Could you clarify what you mean by…?
phrases.example: Could you clarify what you mean by ‘ready’?
Next steps are QA, then a limited rollout.
